name: autonomous-fleet
description: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 14 mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, dependency-update, cleanup, bug-batch, adversarial-review-and-fix, targeted-migration, design-integration, landing-page-convergence, legacy-rebuild, take-product-to-completion, contract-first-build, scaffold-align, inference-cost) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns.
